---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help improve a skill
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Which skill?**
Name of the skill file.

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what the bug is.

**Expected behavior**
What should happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happens.

**Environment (please complete):**
- Agent: [e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Hermes Agent]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 26.3.1]
- Skill version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
